creator: adridg@freebsd.org
text:
Feel free to send patches.

The Qt configure process is convoluted enough already, and FreeBSD isn't an officially supported platform anyway. We're not really interested in supporting even more obscure setups.

See also PR 204923, 208811 .. qmake and the Qt buildsystem don't really listen to $(CC) and the like, they use what the mkspecs define. So you may have some luck locally editing the mkspecs for your system to apply whatever weird compiler flags you want.

My advice? Just unset CPUTYPE, build Qt5Core once, and use that.
